title: 2026 F1 Japanese GP FRIDAY Practice  Analysis
description:
2026 F1 Japanese GP FRIDAY Practice  Analysis. 

Oscar Piastri tops Friday practice at Suzuka, leading both Mercedes drivers in a session that’s already exposing the circuit’s usual high-speed challenges. McLaren look especially strong through the Esses and into Degner, with Piastri’s balance allowing him to carry consistent minimum speed through the long-direction changes.

title: Verstappen And Red Bull’s Massive Problems Explained | F1 Explainer
description:
What has happened to Red Bull Racing and McLaren? The teams that once dominated Formula 1 now find themselves in deep trouble. In China, everything went wrong: Max Verstappen had issues and retired, Isack Hadjar spun, the RB22 lacks both speed and reliability, and McLaren did not even make it to the start. Meanwhile, Mercedes and Ferrari simply drove away from the field.

title: 2026 F1 Australian GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: The factory Mercedes team - George Russell heading Kimi Antonelli - duly finished one-two in Melbourne on Sunday, exhibiting more power, more downforce, more grip and more balance than all of their opposition - and capped all of that with perfect strategy calls. title: Australian grand prix Review | Day 10 of learning #F1 #drivetosurvive  #f1explained
description:
Ferrari… we have the car, we have the drivers… but strategy?”

What a crazy season opener at the Australian Grand Prix 🏁
George Russell wins the race, leading a Mercedes 1-2 with Kimi Antonelli, while Ferrari finishes P3 and P4 with Leclerc and Hamilton despite strong pace.

Meanwhile Max Verstappen climbed from P20 to P6, one of the drives of the race.

The 2026 F1 season has started with drama already.
